title: geranium nervifolium
intro: Geranium nervifolium, also known as the "nervous root" or "wood cranesbill," is a perennial plant belonging to the geranium family (Geraniaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Geranium nervifolium include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps, as well as the potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Geranium nervifolium can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
